launch_decision.last_public_release_approval_record: Explicit owner approval received on 2026-07-12 to remediate and publish the 0.2.0 GitHub and Hugging Face surfaces

include: schemas, verifier contracts, adapters, and flow scaffolds
audited SCD and target-identification aggregate results cards

typed agentic_drug_discovery source capture and payload-free compilation, bounded planning, tool execution, disease/target/assay/model-system/intervention/trial/design/safety/mapping/synthesis identity continuity, composite pinned-source gates, semantic promotion, stage and multi-stage program orchestration, matched evaluation, strict replay, transition core, and fail-closed tests

dependency-free pinned-evidence adapter and compiler, CDC MMWR, NCBI PubMed treatment-gap and disease-model, ChEMBL functional-activity, and ClinicalTrials.gov endpoint/safety trial-design provider verifiers, machine schemas, synthetic examples, typed endpoint, safety, and lineage controls, review report, and typed binding
payload-free machine snapshot of the external ChEMBL/PubMed preclinical contract run, including hashes, matched outcomes, and exact-replay limitations
payload-free machine snapshot of the external ClinicalTrials.gov endpoint/safety design contract run, including NCT/design/safety identities, hashes, matched outcomes, and exact-replay limitations

atomic multi-trial ClinicalTrials.gov portfolio extraction plus reviewer-approved endpoint-family mapping with exact bindings, append-only replay, synthetic public examples, and no ontology-authority claim
explicit source-disjoint cross-trial hazard-ratio and serious-event harmonization with retained trial-level values, no automatic pooling, and no clinical acceptability inference
eight-stage provider-backed program fixture with one cumulative execution ledger, typed identity continuity through regulatory review, and exact accepted-packet replay
benchmark/ scorer and tests for the separately hosted clinical-trial decision dataset
audit scripts and GitHub Actions release audit
exclude: raw source bundles, real provider review jobs, and ingestion runs
real multi-trial portfolio review files, reviewer working identities, and ontology-resolution artifacts
pooled meta-analysis, benefit-risk scores, clinical acceptability judgments, or treatment recommendations

required_checks.name: python_lint
required_checks.command: python3 -m ruff check agentic_drug_discovery tests adapters/boltz_adapter.py adapters/chembl_adapter.py adapters/opentargets_adapter.py adapters/execution_registry.py adapters/pinned_evidence_adapter.py adapters/clinical_synthesis_adapter.py scripts/audit

required_checks.name: python_compile
required_checks.command: python3 -m compileall agentic_drug_discovery adapters chains benchmark/src scripts/audit tests

hard_stop_if: any release-surface file has unreviewed sensitive content
the candidate is merged to public GitHub main or uploaded to the public Hugging Face Dataset without explicit approval
the README overstates built functionality beyond the audited slice
the Hugging Face mirror is stale relative to the reviewed source commit or fails exact file/hash validation
Croissant metadata for the separate clinical-trial-decision-benchmark enters this Hub package
